command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

# Step 1: Stash all uncommitted changes (preserve them)
echo '=STASH_SAVE='
git stash save 'wave1-baseline-uncommitted-20260623T170306Z' 2>&1 || echo 'nothing to stash or stash failed'
git stash list

echo '=HEAD_CONFIRM='
git log --oneline -1

# Step 2: Create rollback tag at current HEAD  
echo '=ROLLBACK_TAG='
git tag wave1-rollback-baseline 2>&1 || echo 'tag already exists'
git tag -l 'wave1-*'

# Step 3: Pop the stash back (restore working state)
echo '=STASH_POP='
git stash pop 2>&1 || echo 'no stash to pop'
git status --short | head -20

# Step 4: Create wave1 branch from current HEAD
echo '=WAVE1_BRANCH='
git checkout -b wave1-reliability-remediation 2>&1 || git checkout wave1-reliability-remediation
git branch

echo '=DONE='
ENDSSH
